title: Let community organisers manage community membership
notes: Suggestion #5 from admin export (submitted by mannyrayner on 2026-05-17). Community organisers need broader self-service privileges, with the immediate requirement that an organiser can add other users as members of their own community without requiring platform-admin intervention. Implement an organiser-facing membership management flow from the community organiser area: search/select an existing user (or enter a username/email if invitations are supported later), add them to the organiser's community with the member role by default, list current community members, and allow safe removal or role changes where appropriate. Preserve security boundaries: organisers must only manage communities where they already have the organiser role; organiser role assignment/removal may need stricter confirmation or remain admin-only in the first version to avoid accidental lockout or privilege escalation. Add audit-friendly feedback/tests for membership creation, duplicate handling, unauthorized access, and attempts to manage another community. This supports upcoming community review sessions and picture-dictionary/game workflows where organisers need to onboard participants directly.
